description_long: This is a compact, rectangular handbag with a warm tan exterior and a subtle, slightly textured finish. The front and back surfaces are adorned with an elegant, symmetrical cream-colored embroidered floral motif, adding a touch of sophistication. The bag features a single, long chain strap with a braided section, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear, attached at both ends with metallic hardware. The top of the bag is fitted with a metallic clasp closure, which is both functional and decorative. The sides of the bag are accented with a vertical cream strip, providing visual contrast and structure. The overall design is refined and suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A tan rectangular handbag with cream floral embroidery, a chain strap, and a metallic clasp closure. The design is elegant and structured, with contrasting cream side accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan surface, cream floral embroidery, and the full length of the chain strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's slim profile, cream vertical strip, and the braided section of the chain strap.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, displaying the same cream floral embroidery and the metallic clasp at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cream vertical strip and the attachment of the chain strap.
attribute_strap_type: Single long chain strap with a braided section, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear, attached at both ends with metal hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Metallic clasp closure located at the top center of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: Cream-colored embroidered floral motif on the front and back surfaces.
attribute_pattern: Floral embroidery on a solid tan background.
